title: ZindagiBacha (StartUP)
description: A healthcare startup focused on providing affordable and accessible medical services to underserved communities through a telemedicine platform.

title: AI-Powered Todo App
description: A full-stack todo application with AI-powered features for task prioritization and completion suggestions.

title: RAG-Powered Chatbot
description: A retrieval-augmented generation chatbot that answers queries based on custom knowledge bases with citation support.

title: NIKE E-commerce Store
description: A modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js, featuring a stateless backend powered by Sanity CMS for dynamic content management. Implements a scalable headless architecture with product catalog, shopping cart, and checkout integration. Demonstrates proficiency in decoupled frontend-backend architecture and headless CMS integration.
